title: Dungeon Crawl
description: Generates large underground dungeon structures in the overworld.
body:
## About
Dungeon Crawl is a mod that adds extensive underground dungeon structures to the overworld for the player to explore. Each dungeon's layout, size, loot, and aesthetics are randomized.

Recent versions are compatible only with the **NeoForge** mod loader; older versions use **Forge**.
If you are looking for a **Fabric** version, consider the [official continuation of Roguelike Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/roguelikedungeons).

## Origin and Related Projects
This mod is meant to be a spiritual successor to the **1.x**
 series of versions of the [Roguelike Dungeons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roguelike-dungeons) (RLD) mod, authored by [Greymerk](https://modrinth.com/user/Greymerk).
As such, it reuses most of RLD's room designs and general architectural style.
The goal is to bring the unique dungeons generated by RLD to newer versions of Minecraft while expanding on the original content and offering more configuration possibilities.

## Customization
Through the power of data packs, you may customize this mod extensively.
For example, you can add mobs, loot, custom themes, and more.
There will be more information about this on the wiki after the release of the **3.0** update.

## State of the Project
The mod is still in active development and is not considered complete.
Stay tuned for updates!
